metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the local-on-demand-delivery-marketplace domain.

rootGroups.name: Consumer Marketplace
rootGroups.description: Demand-side discovery, ordering, loyalty, tracking, and issue recovery.

subGroups.name: Discovery and choice
subGroups.description: Entry, search, ranking, menu, assortment, and local availability surfaces.

bricks.name: Local Commerce Home
bricks.description: Personalized marketplace entry surface for restaurants, grocery, convenience, retail, offers, subscription benefits, and reorder missions.

internalModules.title: Home feed orchestration
internalModules.description: Combines location, time-of-day, cuisine, basket, promotion, and loyalty signals into a ranked entry feed.

interfaces.title: Consumer home UI
interfaces.description: Web and app entry point for local ordering sessions.

brickDependencies.description: Uses consumer preference and reorder candidates.

dataDependencies.description: Reads consumer preferences, address, and membership state.

bricks.name: Search, Browse & Ranking
bricks.description: Keyword search, cuisine/category browse, grocery item search, ranking, filtering, and availability-aware result ordering.

internalModules.title: Local ranking engine
internalModules.description: Ranks stores and items using distance, delivery promise, availability, conversion, fees, quality, and promotion context.

interfaces.title: Search and browse UI
interfaces.description: Consumer-facing discovery surface across verticals.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on normalized menus, item content, store hours, and availability.

dataDependencies.description: Reads menu, item, assortment, and availability data.

bricks.name: Reorder & Recommendation Engine
bricks.description: Personalized recommendations for stores, items, bundles, reorders, grocery replenishment, and cross-vertical discovery.

internalModules.title: Mission classifier
internalModules.description: Detects quick meal, planned meal, grocery top-up, convenience, and retail missions from behavior.

interfaces.title: Recommendation API
interfaces.description: Feeds personalized modules into home, search, cart, and checkout.

dataDependencies.description: Reads order and session history for personalization.

bricks.name: Storefront, Menu & Item Detail
bricks.description: Store profile pages, menu browsing, item modifiers, photos, ratings, allergens, substitutions, and grocery item detail.

internalModules.title: Item detail composer
internalModules.description: Assembles price, availability, options, dietary attributes, photos, and trust signals.

interfaces.title: Storefront UI
interfaces.description: Consumer menu and assortment detail surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses quality and review signals in decision surfaces.

dataDependencies.description: Reads store, menu, item, option, and assortment content.

bricks.name: Ratings, Reviews & Quality Signals
bricks.description: Store ratings, item reviews, delivery quality signals, defect feedback, and marketplace quality ranking inputs.

internalModules.title: Quality signal aggregator
internalModules.description: Combines ratings, refunds, lateness, substitutions, cancellations, and support signals.

interfaces.title: Review and rating UI
interfaces.description: Consumer and merchant feedback capture and display.

dataDependencies.description: Owns reviews, ratings, and defect quality signals.

subGroups.name: Order and loyalty
subGroups.description: Basket, checkout, subscription, tracking, and care.

bricks.name: Basket & Substitution Planner
bricks.description: Multi-item basket state, fees preview, item modifiers, substitutions, unavailable-item handling, and group order coordination.

internalModules.title: Basket pricing preview
internalModules.description: Maintains basket state with taxes, fees, discounts, and expected substitutions.

interfaces.title: Basket UI
interfaces.description: Consumer cart and item-editing flow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses current basket economics before checkout.

dataDependencies.description: Owns active basket state and substitution preferences.

bricks.name: Checkout, Payments & Tipping
bricks.description: Checkout, payment authorization, stored payment methods, tips, credits, service fees, delivery fees, and regulatory payment disclosures.

internalModules.title: Payment orchestration
internalModules.description: Routes payment authorization, wallet, credits, and refundability checks.

interfaces.title: Checkout UI
interfaces.description: Consumer payment, tip, address, and delivery option flow.

brickDependencies.description: Requires reliable transaction posting and settlement state.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Payment processors
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Card, wallet, local payment, and fraud screening providers.

dataDependencies.description: Owns consumer order payment transaction state.

bricks.name: Membership & Subscription Benefits
bricks.description: Subscription programs, free delivery benefits, credits, partner benefits, churn prevention, and member value explanation.

internalModules.title: Benefit eligibility engine
internalModules.description: Determines delivery-fee, service-fee, credit, and partner benefit eligibility by basket and market.

interfaces.title: Membership management UI
interfaces.description: Join, trial, renewal, cancellation, and benefit explanation surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Applies membership-linked benefits during basket and checkout.

dataDependencies.description: Owns active subscription state and benefit history.

bricks.name: Order Management & State Machine
bricks.description: Canonical order lifecycle from placement through merchant acceptance, preparation, courier pickup, delivery, cancellation, refund, and dispute.

internalModules.title: Order state machine
internalModules.description: Maintains valid state transitions, ownership handoffs, and exception handling.

interfaces.title: Order API
interfaces.description: Canonical order state API used by consumer, merchant, courier, support, and finance surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Coordinates fulfillment state with courier assignment.

dataDependencies.description: Owns canonical order state and event history.

bricks.name: Live Tracking & Notifications
bricks.description: Consumer-facing estimated time of arrival, map tracking, preparation visibility, courier arrival notifications, and exception updates.

internalModules.title: ETA explanation service
internalModules.description: Combines preparation, dispatch, route, and delay signals into customer-readable promises.

interfaces.title: Live order tracker
interfaces.description: Map and status timeline across app, web, SMS, push, and email.

brickDependencies.description: Uses dispatch and courier location events.
Uses canonical order state updates.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Mapping providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Map rendering, geocoding, and route visualization.

dataDependencies.description: Reads courier, route, and order tracking events.

bricks.name: Customer Care & Issue Resolution
bricks.description: Self-service help, refunds, credits, missing item claims, late-order recovery, support case routing, and agent tooling.

internalModules.title: Resolution policy engine
internalModules.description: Determines refund, credit, escalation, and merchant or courier claim workflows.

interfaces.title: Help and support UI
interfaces.description: Consumer, merchant, courier, and agent resolution workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trust signals to prevent refund and promotion abuse.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Contact-center platform
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Agent routing, conversation history, and workforce operations.

dataDependencies.description: Owns issue, resolution, and escalation records.

rootGroups.name: Merchant and Retailer Growth
rootGroups.description: Supply-side onboarding, catalog, pricing, promotion, ads, operations, and insights.

subGroups.name: Merchant operations
subGroups.description: Merchant identity, catalog, pricing, and order preparation operations.

bricks.name: Merchant Onboarding & Compliance
bricks.description: Restaurant, grocery, convenience, and retail partner onboarding, contracts, tax data, bank details, KYC/KYB, and store activation.

internalModules.title: Partner activation workflow
internalModules.description: Tracks onboarding tasks from lead through compliant live store.

interfaces.title: Merchant onboarding portal
interfaces.description: Partner sign-up, verification, and launch readiness workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity, sanctions, tax, and payment compliance verification.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: KYB providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Business verification, tax, and sanctions screening.

dataDependencies.description: Owns merchant account, contract, and activation state.

bricks.name: Catalog, Menu & Assortment Management
bricks.description: Menu authoring, grocery item catalog, SKU mapping, modifier groups, item availability, photos, nutrition, allergens, and out-of-stock handling.

internalModules.title: Catalog normalization service
internalModules.description: Normalizes menus, options, retail SKUs, and cross-market attributes.

interfaces.title: Catalog management portal
interfaces.description: Merchant and operator catalog maintenance workflow.

dataDependencies.description: Owns catalog, menu, SKU, option, and availability records.

bricks.name: Pricing, Fees & Promotion Engine
bricks.description: Consumer fees, delivery fees, service fees, merchant-funded offers, vouchers, item discounts, affordability programs, and fee transparency.

internalModules.title: Offer and fee calculator
internalModules.description: Calculates basket-level economics using market, distance, demand, membership, and promotion rules.

interfaces.title: Pricing API
interfaces.description: Shared price, fee, tax, discount, and voucher calculation interface.

dataDependencies.description: Owns fee, promotion, and pricing rule state.

bricks.name: Merchant Order Prep & POS Integration
bricks.description: Merchant order tablet, POS injection, accept/reject flows, prep-time updates, substitution communication, and store busy-mode controls.

internalModules.title: POS order adapter
internalModules.description: Maps marketplace order states into restaurant and retailer POS workflows.

interfaces.title: Merchant order manager
interfaces.description: Order acceptance, prep, substitution, and handoff surface.

brickDependencies.description: Updates canonical order state as merchants accept and prepare orders.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Restaurant and retailer POS systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Order injection and menu sync integrations.

dataDependencies.description: Owns merchant accept, prep, delay, and handoff events.

subGroups.name: Growth and monetization
subGroups.description: Merchant acquisition, ads, reporting, and retail media.

bricks.name: Merchant Promotions & CRM
bricks.description: Merchant-funded promotions, lifecycle campaigns, audience targeting, winback offers, first-order incentives, and offer performance measurement.

internalModules.title: Campaign eligibility service
internalModules.description: Controls audience, budget, offer, and campaign eligibility constraints.

interfaces.title: Merchant promotion console
interfaces.description: Self-service promotion creation and reporting.

brickDependencies.description: Applies promotional economics during basket and checkout.

dataDependencies.description: Owns promotion, budget, and redemption records.

bricks.name: Sponsored Listings & Retail Media
bricks.description: Self-service ad buying, sponsored restaurants, sponsored products, auction ranking, campaign budgets, attribution, and advertiser reporting.

internalModules.title: Ads auction and pacing
internalModules.description: Runs sponsored placement eligibility, bidding, pacing, and budget control.

interfaces.title: Ads manager
interfaces.description: Campaign setup and measurement for merchants and CPG advertisers.

brickDependencies.description: Places sponsored results inside discovery flows.
Uses campaign impression, click, order, and incrementality signals.

dataDependencies.description: Owns ad campaign, auction, impression, click, and spend records.

bricks.name: Merchant Analytics & Insights
bricks.description: Merchant sales reporting, operations diagnostics, customer insights, retention analysis, prep-time performance, ads measurement, and financial reconciliation.

internalModules.title: Merchant performance mart
internalModules.description: Aggregates orders, conversion, quality, operations, promotions, and payout metrics.

interfaces.title: Merchant analytics dashboard
interfaces.description: Self-service reporting and action guidance for merchant operators.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on governed analytics datasets.

dataDependencies.description: Owns merchant performance and operational analytics marts.

bricks.name: Grocery and Retail Partner Operations
bricks.description: Grocery, convenience, pharmacy, and retail partner onboarding, picker workflow integration, substitution control, weighted items, and aisle-level catalog operations.

internalModules.title: Retail fulfillment adapter
internalModules.description: Connects marketplace orders with retailer picker, inventory, and substitution workflows.

interfaces.title: Retail operations console
interfaces.description: Retail order, substitution, and inventory management surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses SKU, stock, unit, and substitution data.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Retail inventory and picking systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Availability, picker workflow, and substitution integrations.

dataDependencies.description: Owns near-real-time retail inventory and substitution state.

rootGroups.name: Courier Logistics
rootGroups.description: Courier onboarding, dispatch, routing, batching, earnings, safety, and logistics reliability.

subGroups.name: Courier supply
subGroups.description: Courier identity, work access, scheduling, and earnings.

bricks.name: Courier Onboarding & Work Access
bricks.description: Courier signup, identity verification, background checks, vehicle setup, market access, document compliance, and activation.

internalModules.title: Courier activation workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates identity, eligibility, vehicle, documents, and training status.

interfaces.title: Courier onboarding app
interfaces.description: Signup, verification, training, and market activation flow.

brickDependencies.description: Requires identity and compliance verification.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Background check providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Market-specific eligibility checks where legally required.

dataDependencies.description: Owns courier profile, activation, and work-access state.

bricks.name: Courier Availability & Incentives
bricks.description: Real-time courier availability, zones, boosts, quests, supply shaping, scheduled shifts, and market heatmaps.

internalModules.title: Supply shaping engine
internalModules.description: Calculates incentive and availability needs by zone, time, weather, and expected demand.

interfaces.title: Courier availability UI
interfaces.description: Courier work-status, incentive, and market demand surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses market demand and courier utilization signals.

dataDependencies.description: Owns courier online, zone, shift, and incentive eligibility state.

bricks.name: Courier Earnings & Payout Experience
bricks.description: Courier pay calculation, tips, incentives, adjustments, instant cashout, tax documents, earnings explanation, and payout support.

internalModules.title: Courier pay calculator
internalModules.description: Calculates delivery pay, distance pay, time pay, boosts, tips, and adjustments under market-specific policies.

interfaces.title: Courier earnings UI
interfaces.description: Earnings, payout, tip, tax, and adjustment surface.

brickDependencies.description: Posts courier earnings and payout obligations.

dataDependencies.description: Owns courier earnings, tip, incentive, and payout records.

subGroups.name: Fulfillment optimization
subGroups.description: Dispatch, routing, batching, ETA, and safety.

bricks.name: Dispatch, Matching & Assignment
bricks.description: Real-time order dispatch, courier matching, pickup assignment, offer acceptance, reassignment, and marketplace balance controls.

internalModules.title: Assignment optimizer
internalModules.description: Matches orders to couriers using location, mode, prep time, reliability, cost, batching, and fairness constraints.

interfaces.title: Dispatch operations console
interfaces.description: Live city operations, exception, and manual intervention surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses prep-time and ready-for-pickup state.

dataDependencies.description: Owns courier assignment, offer, acceptance, and reassignment state.

bricks.name: Routing, Geospatial & ETA
bricks.description: Travel-time prediction, geocoding, dropoff validation, delivery zones, routing, weather-aware ETA, and courier navigation context.

internalModules.title: ETA prediction model
internalModules.description: Predicts prep, pickup, route, handoff, and dropoff times for consumer and operations use.

interfaces.title: ETA and route API
interfaces.description: Shared interface for promise, dispatch, tracking, and courier navigation.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Maps, traffic, and geocoding providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Routing, address validation, and travel-time inputs.

dataDependencies.description: Owns address, zone, route, ETA, and location-derived events.

bricks.name: Batching & Multi-Stop Optimization
bricks.description: Order batching, route sequencing, multi-merchant pickup, stacked deliveries, and lateness-risk controls.

internalModules.title: Batch optimizer
internalModules.description: Selects eligible order combinations while protecting customer promise and courier economics.

interfaces.title: Batch decision API
interfaces.description: Provides batching options to dispatch and ETA systems.

brickDependencies.description: Uses travel-time and route-sequencing estimates.

dataDependencies.description: Reads historical and live delivery events for batching decisions.

bricks.name: Courier Safety & Incident Response
bricks.description: Courier safety toolkit, emergency support, incident reporting, delivery proof, unsafe-location handling, and trust-sensitive escalations.

internalModules.title: Incident triage service
internalModules.description: Routes courier, consumer, and merchant safety incidents to the right operational path.

interfaces.title: Safety toolkit
interfaces.description: Courier in-app safety and incident reporting interface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses risk rules for incident escalation and account action.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Emergency and safety vendors
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Market-specific emergency escalation and safety tooling.

dataDependencies.description: Owns safety incident and emergency escalation records.

rootGroups.name: Marketplace Foundations
rootGroups.description: Identity, risk, financial ledger, experimentation, APIs, data, and platform operations.

subGroups.name: Trust and financial control
subGroups.description: Identity, fraud, compliance, ledger, settlement, and tax.

bricks.name: Identity, Account & Access
bricks.description: Consumer, merchant, courier, employee, and partner identity, authentication, authorization, device trust, and account recovery.

internalModules.title: Unified identity service
internalModules.description: Maintains account identity, authentication factors, permissions, and device trust.

interfaces.title: Identity API
interfaces.description: Authentication and account access services for all marketplace actors.

dataDependencies.description: Owns account, credential, and access-control state.

bricks.name: Fraud, Abuse & Policy Controls
bricks.description: Payment fraud, refund abuse, promo abuse, fake accounts, merchant abuse, courier collusion, restricted items, and marketplace policy enforcement.

internalModules.title: Risk decision engine
internalModules.description: Combines rules, models, and case outcomes into account, transaction, and order decisions.

interfaces.title: Risk decision API
interfaces.description: Real-time risk checks for checkout, onboarding, support, and payout flows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses account and device trust signals.

dataDependencies.description: Owns risk signals, decisions, and policy actions.

bricks.name: Ledger, Settlement & Tax
bricks.description: Financial ledger, merchant settlement, courier payout, consumer refunds, tax calculation, invoicing, reserves, and reconciliation.

internalModules.title: Marketplace ledger
internalModules.description: Posts consumer charges, platform fees, merchant receivables, courier payables, refunds, taxes, and adjustments.

interfaces.title: Ledger API
interfaces.description: Financial posting and settlement interface.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Payment, banking, and tax providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Payment acquiring, payouts, invoicing, and tax calculation.

dataDependencies.description: Owns immutable financial postings and settlement records.

subGroups.name: Intelligence and platform
subGroups.description: Experimentation, data, APIs, observability, and platform operations.

bricks.name: Experimentation & Growth Measurement
bricks.description: A/B testing, holdouts, causal measurement, marketplace incrementality, metric guardrails, and product decision dashboards.

internalModules.title: Experiment assignment service
internalModules.description: Provides consistent actor-level assignment and guardrail measurement across surfaces.

interfaces.title: Experimentation console
interfaces.description: Experiment setup, monitoring, and readout workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses governed marketplace metrics and event streams.

dataDependencies.description: Owns assignment, exposure, and experiment readout state.

bricks.name: Marketplace Data Platform
bricks.description: Governed event streams, core metrics, forecasting datasets, ranking features, business intelligence, and ML feature pipelines.

internalModules.title: Marketplace metric layer
internalModules.description: Publishes standard definitions for GMV/GTV, orders, active users, defect rates, utilization, and profitability.

interfaces.title: Analytics and feature APIs
interfaces.description: Data access for analytics, ML, and product reporting.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Cloud data warehouse and streaming platform
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Event ingestion, storage, transformation, and query execution.

dataDependencies.description: Owns standard business and product metric datasets.

bricks.name: Partner APIs & Webhooks
bricks.description: APIs and webhooks for merchants, aggregators, POS providers, retail partners, couriers, ads buyers, and enterprise integrations.

internalModules.title: Developer gateway
internalModules.description: Manages API authentication, rate limits, webhooks, schemas, and partner environments.

interfaces.title: Developer portal
interfaces.description: Documentation, keys, test tools, and integration health.

brickDependencies.description: Uses partner authentication and authorization.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.name: Merchant and aggregator systems
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: External order, menu, inventory, and reporting integrations.

dataDependencies.description: Owns partner API usage, webhook, and integration-health records.

bricks.name: Marketplace Operations Console
bricks.description: City operations, live marketplace health, incident response, manual interventions, regulatory reporting, and operational playbooks.

internalModules.title: Market health monitor
internalModules.description: Tracks demand, supply, prep, cancellations, lateness, support, and incident metrics by zone.

interfaces.title: Operations control room
interfaces.description: Internal city operations and incident management surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses operational health metrics and alerts.

dataDependencies.description: Owns operational incident, playbook, and manual intervention records.
